name: algmatch
summary: A package containing various matching algorithms, such as stable marriage, hospital-residents, and student-project allocation including the cases with ties/indifference.
author_email: Ben Whitehead <ben.pi.whitehead@gmail.com>, Varad Kulkarni <varadkulk123@gmail.com>, Sofiat Olaosebikan <sofiat.olaosebikan@glasgow.ac.uk>
